name: marketingskills
description: Provides marketing capabilities tailored for Claude Code and AI agents, focusing on conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering to enhance automated marketing workflows.

inputs.name: marketing_goal
inputs.description: The specific marketing objective or target to achieve.

inputs.name: content_topic
inputs.description: The subject matter or theme for copywriting and SEO tasks.

inputs.name: keyword_list
inputs.description: A list of keywords or phrases to incorporate for SEO optimization.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Collected marketing analytics data to inform growth engineering decisions.

outputs.name: performance_report
outputs.description: Analysis and insights based on marketing analytics data.

outputs.name: growth_strategy
outputs.description: Recommended CRO and growth engineering strategies to implement.

steps: Define marketing goals and target audience.
Gather topics and relevant SEO keywords.
Generate marketing copy optimized for SEO and conversion.
Analyze existing analytics data to evaluate performance.
Develop growth strategies based on analytics and CRO principles.
Deploy recommendations and iterate on marketing efforts.
use_cases: Automating creation of SEO-friendly marketing copy for product launches.
Improving website conversion rates through data-driven content optimization.
Generating reports and actionable insights from marketing analytics.
Integrating marketing workflows into AI agents like Claude Code for autonomous growth.
patterns: Conversion rate optimization workflow integrating copywriting and analytics

prompt_templates.name: seo_copywriting
prompt_templates.template: Write SEO-optimized marketing copy about {content_topic} focusing on these keywords: {keyword_list}. The goal is to {marketing_goal}.

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_recommendation
prompt_templates.template: Based on these analytics data: {analytics_data}, suggest a growth engineering strategy to improve conversion rates and overall marketing performance.

prompt_templates.name: performance_summary
prompt_templates.template: Summarize the marketing performance given the following data: {analytics_data}.
